title: Lead Plaintiff Deadlines in Shareholder Class Action Lawsuits Against Phreesia, Inc. (PHR), AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV), and Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) Announced by Holzer & Holzer, LLC
author: Holzer & Holzer, Llc
description: Holzer & Holzer, LLC announces lead plaintiff deadlines for shareholder class action lawsuits against three companies. Phreesia faces allegations of false statements regarding long-term growth outlook (deadline July 13, 2026). AeroVironment is accused of misrepresenting its competitive landscape (deadline July 27, 2026). Lucid Group faces claims about false statements regarding manufacturing and delivery capabilities (deadline July 28, 2026). Investors who purchased shares during the alleged fraud periods and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is defendant in shareholder class action alleging materially false/misleading statements regarding long-term growth outlook between May 2025 and March 2026, indicating potential fraud and investor losses.

Company is defendant in shareholder class action alleging false statements and failure to disclose material facts regarding competitive landscape between June 2025 and March 2026, suggesting potential securities violations.

Company is defendant in shareholder class action alleging materially false statements regarding manufacturing and delivery capabilities and overall operations between February and April 2026, indicating potential operational misrepresentation.

title: REGENCELL DEADLINE: ROSEN, A LEADING INVESTOR RIGHTS LAW FIRM, Encourages Regencell Bioscience Holdings Limited Investors with Losses in Excess of $100K to Secure Counsel Before Important June 23 Deadline in Securities Class Action – RGC
author: Rosen Law Firm
description: Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors in Regencell Bioscience Holdings Limited (RGC) and AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) of upcoming lead plaintiff deadlines in securities class action lawsuits. The lawsuits allege that defendants made false or misleading statements regarding market manipulation vulnerabilities, regulatory risks, and financial exposure during their respective class periods.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is subject to a securities class action lawsuit alleging false/misleading statements about vulnerability to market manipulation, resulting volatility, and regulatory risks. Investors with losses exceeding $100K are being encouraged to join the lawsuit.

Company is subject to a securities class action lawsuit. While details are incomplete in the article, the presence of a class action with investor losses exceeding $100K indicates negative developments.

title: AVAV Stockholders Have Rights – If You Lost Money Investing in AeroVironment, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
author: Robbins Llp
description: Robbins LLP filed a class action lawsuit against AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) alleging the company misled investors about the viability of its SCAR program involvement. After acquiring BlueHalo in May 2025, AeroVironment assured investors the program would drive growth, but the U.S. Space Force issued a stop work order in January 2026 and subsequently terminated the contract. The company took a $151.3 million goodwill impairment and stock price fell over 22% across two announcements.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company allegedly misled investors about SCAR program prospects, faced a government stop work order, contract termination, $151.3 million goodwill impairment, and significant stock price declines (15% and 6.24% on separate dates), resulting in shareholder class action litigation.

title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges AeroVironment, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
author: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman Llc
description: A class action lawsuit has been filed against AeroVironment, Inc. alleging that the company made materially false and misleading statements regarding its business prospects during the period from June 25, 2025 to March 10, 2026. The complaint claims AeroVironment understated competition risks related to the SCAR program and U.S. Space Force modernization efforts, thereby overstating its financial prospects. Investors who suffered losses have until July 27, 2026 to request lead plaintiff status.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is the subject of a securities fraud class action lawsuit alleging material misstatements and omissions regarding business prospects and competitive risks. This represents significant legal and reputational risk to the company and its investors.

title: ROSEN, A GLOBAL AND LEADING LAW FIRM, Encourages AeroVironment, Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - AVAV
author: Rosen Law Firm
description: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against AeroVironment, Inc. (AVAV) for allegedly making false and misleading statements about its business prospects during the Class Period (June 25, 2025 - March 10, 2026). The lawsuit claims the company understated competition risks related to U.S. Space Force contracts (SCAR and SCN programs) and overstated its financial prospects. Investors who purchased securities during this period may be eligible for compensation. The lead plaintiff deadline is July 27, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is the subject of a securities class action lawsuit alleging material misstatements and omissions regarding competitive risks and business prospects. Investors suffered damages when the true details entered the market, indicating significant corporate governance and disclosure failures.
